keywords: what is the shelf life of olive oil
faq.answer: Olive oil usually has a shelf life of around 18 to 24 months when stored properly in a cool and dark place.

keywords: how should olive oil be stored
best way to store olive oil
faq.answer: Olive oil should be stored in a cool and dark place away from heat and sunlight to maintain its quality and freshness.
